reasoning: The creation of a circuit split by the Third Circuit's Schaffner decision on FIFRA preemption provides strong justification for Supreme Court review, exactly as Bayer (Monsanto) intended. The Court typically grants certiorari much more frequently (20-30%+) when resolving a clear, acknowledged split on an important federal issue affecting tens of thousands of cases. However, there are significant obstacles to a 'Yes' resolution by Jan 2026: (1) the Court might view this Missouri state court case as a poor vehicle and choose a federal case instead; (2) the Court frequently requests the views of the Solicitor General (CVSG) before granting cert in complex preemption cases, which would delay any decision on certiorari past the January 15, 2026 deadline. Given these timing and vehicle concerns, I estimate a 47% probability.
